metadata.description: The running app id, or "home" for the launcher.
Installed-app registry: [{ id, title, icon, application }]. Seeded by the host/desktop.
The active document (user-space name) when an app was launched with one, else null.

(state, appId, docName?, opts?) → activate an app. With a docName, ensure its user-space is loaded (loadUserSpace if in the store, else newUserSpace under the app's application; opts.save===false → no persist), then set os.active + os.doc.
(state, appId) → set os.active (the app is already loaded).
(state, opts?) → return to the launcher; opts.save && os.doc → saveUserSpace first. Sets os.active="home", os.doc=null.
(state, app) → append { id, title, icon, application } to os.apps (idempotent by id).
